title: Requesting Access to New Software Tools or Applications
text:
Q: How do I request access to a new software tool or application?
A: To request access to a new software tool or application, please follow these steps: Windows: Step 1: Open your web browser and navigate to the company intranet. Step 2: Log in using your company credentials. Step 3: Locate the 'IT Helpdesk' section from the main menu. Step 4: Click on 'Software Requests' and fill out the form with the required details, including the name of the software, purpose, and any specific access needs. Step 5: Submit the form. macOS: Step 1: Open Safari or your preferred web browser and go to the company intranet. Step 2: Sign in with your company credentials. Step 3: Find the 'IT Helpdesk' section in the navigation menu. Step 4: Select 'Software Requests' and complete the form with the necessary information, such as the software name, intended use, and any specific access requirements. Step 5: Click 'Submit' to send your request. After submission, you will receive a confirmation email, and the IT team will review your request and contact you if further information is needed.
